holdings.n: Invesco Premier U.S. Government Money Portfolio Institutional Class

news.t: Invesco to Advance Active Capabilities with Three New Active ETFs

holdings.infoBox: CSTK is an equity ETF with a total of 54 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 4.08%, Bank of America at 3.84%, Cisco Systems at 3.72%, CVS Health at 3.55%, and Invesco Premier U.S. Government Money Portfolio Institutional Class at 3.29%.

overview.description: The Invesco Comstock Contrarian Equity ETF (CSTK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that aims for capital growth and income by broadly investing in undervalued companies of any market capitalization from around the world. CSTK was launched on May 7, 2025 and is issued by Invesco.

holdings.n: Invesco Premier U.S. Government Money Portfolio Institutional Class

data.title: Invesco to Advance Active Capabilities with Three New Active ETFs
data.text: Invesco launches three high-quality, active ETF strategies that effectively leverage the expertise of its in-house active managers. ATLANTA , May 7, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Invesco Ltd.
